metadata.dataset: CareLoop Demo Center compact treatment history
metadata.granularity: One compact record per treatment; no minute-level telemetry.
metadata.purpose: Provide longitudinal context for Mira and visible traceability for the four POC scenarios.

events.note: Anxiety reported; simulated RN decision and shortened treatment documented.
Dizziness reported; simulated RN review recorded.
Nausea and low BP reported; simulated RN review recorded.
Low BP trend reported; simulated RN review recorded.
Mild soreness reported; simulated RN review recorded.
Tenderness reported with otherwise stable treatment data.
